trans-unit.source: Browse and search Aspire documentation from aspire.dev
trans-unit.target: Browse and search Aspire documentation from aspire.dev

trans-unit.source: Documentation page '{0}' not found. Use 'aspire docs list' to see available pages.
trans-unit.target: Stránka dokumentace {0} nebyla nalezena. Pokud chcete zobrazit dostupné stránky, použijte příkaz aspire docs list.

trans-unit.source: Get the full content of a documentation page by its slug
trans-unit.target: Get the full content of a documentation page by its slug

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of search results to return (default: 5, max: 10)
trans-unit.target: Maximum number of search results to return (default: 5, max: 10)

trans-unit.source: List all available Aspire documentation pages
trans-unit.target: List all available Aspire documentation pages

trans-unit.source: No documentation available. The aspire.dev docs may not have loaded correctly.
trans-unit.target: Není dostupná žádná dokumentace. Dokumentace aspire.dev se možná nenačetla správně.

trans-unit.source: No results found for '{0}'. Try different search terms.
trans-unit.target: Pro {0} se nenašly žádné výsledky. Zkuste použít jiné hledané termíny.

trans-unit.source: Return only the specified section of the page
trans-unit.target: Return only the specified section of the page

trans-unit.source: The slug of the documentation page (e.g., 'redis-integration')
trans-unit.target: The slug of the documentation page (e.g., 'redis-integration')
